name: Brownie Mix- Make a Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients well in a bowl.
2. Cut in the vegetable shortening until evenly distributed (I used my mixer).
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container and store in a cool, dry place. Use within 10-12 weeks.
4. To make brownies, mix 2 beaten eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract with 2-1/2 cups of the prepared brownie mix.
5. Add half a cup of chopped nuts (optional).
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square pan (or a 9 by 12 inch glass pan for double batches) and bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
- For double batches, bake for approximately 25 minutes.
Cheryl B. Northern Coastal California
